entities.name: Architectural Review
entities.context: Phase 2 process for checking designs against architectural principles

entities.name: Single Source of Truth (Principle 2)
entities.context: Architectural principle requiring no redundancy in data/systems

entities.name: Anti-overwrite (Principle 5)
entities.context: Architectural principle for safe file handling

entities.name: Dry-run support (Principle 7)
entities.context: Architectural principle requiring test before committing changes

entities.name: Minimal context (Principle 8)
entities.context: Architectural principle for efficient design with reduced context requirements

entities.name: Error handling (Principle 11)
entities.context: Architectural principle requiring documented failure modes

entities.name: Complete before claiming complete (Principle 15)
entities.context: Architectural principle requiring clear definition of done

entities.name: Accuracy over sophistication (Principle 16)
entities.context: Architectural principle prioritizing facts over speculation

entities.name: Test with production config (Principle 17)
entities.context: Architectural principle for real environment validation

entities.name: State verification (Principle 18)
entities.context: Architectural principle to check writes succeeded

entities.name: Explicit recovery paths (Principle 19)
entities.context: Architectural principle for error handling with clear recovery
